main.description: Toggle a like on a game. Creates a like record if none exists, deletes it if one does.

subject.description: AT URI of the game record to like/unlike.

uri.description: AT URI of the created like record. Present when action is 'liked'.

cid.description: CID of the created like record. Present when action is 'liked'.

action.description: Whether the game was liked or unliked.
